---
title: "Lab 5 — Reproducible CLI Workflow"
---

# Lab 5 — Reproducible CLI Workflow

**Read first:** Chapters 15–18 (Advanced CLI; Designing Projects; Reproducible Research).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_05.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
